title: Agents frequently die in low health
insight: The majority, 91%, of deaths occur when the agent's health is below 30 HP.

title: Agents often die in short episodes
insight: Episodes end with a death much faster than they succeed, indicating the agent's performance is precarious.
evidence: Mean episode length — deaths 95 vs successes 0 steps

title: Agent tends to die near the beginning of its life
insight: The mean health just before death (13.7) suggests agents often fail early in their lives.
